Supplementary Series Home | Stadium Series Home | Battle Revolution Home

Battle Revolution Pokémon (Lv.50 All, Doubles)

These Pokémon can be selected for opposing Trainers' teams in the following colosseums for battles in Lv.50 Doubles:

  • Main Street Colosseum
  • Waterfall Colosseum
  • Neon Colosseum
  • Crystal Colosseum
  • Magma Colosseum
  • Sunset Colosseum

All Pokémon have random IVs and Natures. All Pokémon are level 50.

Moves marked as "random level-up moves" should be only taken from the moves the Pokémon can learn at or below level 50. Information about TMs included in the different random TM groups can be found here.

At any given rank, the player may see Pokémon whose rank is the same as the current rank number, one lower, or one higher. For example, at Rank 4, Pokémon in ranks 3-5 can be encountered.

  • Rank 1 Pokémon
  • Rank 2 Pokémon
  • Rank 3 Pokémon
  • Rank 4 Pokémon
  • Rank 5 Pokémon
  • Rank 6 Pokémon
  • Rank 7 Pokémon
  • Rank 8 Pokémon
